  1. Trier /

  3. Weinstube Kesselstatt

Regional / Wine Tavern · Mid-range

Weinstube Kesselstatt

Innenstadt (Old Town) · Taegl. 11-23

Weinstube Kesselstatt inside the Palais Kesselstatt on Liebfrauenplatz is Trier at its purest: a courtyard terrace looking onto the cathedral and the Liebfrauenkirche (Church of Our Lady), a regional menu with Moselle classics, and wines from Reichsgraf von Kesselstatt. On a sunny day, the prettiest seat in town.

Practical info

Cuisine
Regional / Wine Tavern
Price level
Mid-range
District
Innenstadt (Old Town)
Opening hours
Taegl. 11-23
Reservation
recommended (by phone)

Trier, älteste Stadt Deutschlands. UNESCO-Welterbe, Mosel-Wein, römisches Erbe - Sehenswürdigkeiten, Hotels, Reise-Guides auf einem Portal.
